summary: Barry Sternlicht, Chairman and CEO at Starwood Capital Group, said his company has been investing in data centers for the past five years, expanding from the US to Europe and Asia.

title: StanChart’s VC Arm Backs Crypto Firm GSR at $1 Billion Valuation
title_cn: 渣打银行的风险投资部门以 10 亿美元的估值支持加密货币公司 GSR
summary: Standard Chartered’s wholly owned venture capital unit SC Ventures has invested in crypto trading firm GSR, as the bank pushes deeper into the digital-assets market.

title_cn: 对冲基金公司 Aspect 向全球投资者提供中国策略
summary: Aspect Capital Ltd. has made one of its China strategies available to international investors for the first time, tapping demand from allocators seeking to diversify their portfolios.

title: Iran-US Skirmishes Only Enlarge the Oil Supply Gap
title_cn: 伊朗与美国的小规模冲突只会扩大石油供应缺口
summary: With every day that the war drags on, the shortfall gets bigger and a market reckoning draws nearer.

title: Pakistan’s Trade Deficit Widens to Highest in Four Years
title_cn: 巴基斯坦贸易逆差扩大至四年来最高
summary: Pakistan’s trade deficit increased to nearly four-year high adding strain to the fragile economy and thin foreign exchange reserves.

title: UniCredit Opens Its €35 Billion Commerzbank Bid to Investors
title_cn: 联合信贷银行向投资者开放其 350 亿欧元德国商业银行的投标
summary: UniCredit SpA has submitted its Commerzbank AG takeover proposal to the target’s shareholders, initiating a six-week period that will decide the German lender’s independence.

title: Stocks Bounce and Oil Slips as Mideast Truce Holds: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 中东休战协议生效，股市反弹，油价下跌：市场总结
summary: US stock futures rebounded and oil prices eased as the ceasefire in the Middle East seemed to hold. Traders are also optimistic that robust earnings will continue to power equities higher.

title: ADM Raises Profit Outlook as US Biofuel Policy Boosts Demand
title_cn: 美国生物燃料政策提振需求，ADM 上调利润预期
summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Co. increased its annual earnings outlook as the crop trader expects a clearer US biofuels policy to offset market disruptions from the conflict in the Middle East.

title: Alphabet Returns to Euro Debt Market for Latest AI Megabond Deal
title_cn: Alphabet 重返欧元债券市场进行最新人工智能超级债券交易
summary: Alphabet Inc. has kicked off its latest megabond deal as it returns to the euro market just months after selling nearly $32 billion of dollar, sterling and Swiss franc-denominated debt.

title: Oil Starting to See Demand Destruction, Rystad Energy Says
title_cn: Rystad Energy 表示，石油需求开始受到破坏
summary: Jorge Leon, senior VP and head of geopolitical analysis at Rystad Energy, says demand destruction has begun in the global oil market due to the Iran war and looks at the potential for additional supplies coming to the market if prices remain at elevated levels. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Vodafone to Buy Out UK’s Biggest Operator for $5.8 Billion
title_cn: 沃达丰将以 58 亿美元收购英国最大运营商
summary: Vodafone Group Plc is buying CK Hutchison Holdings Ltd. stake in the UK’s largest mobile operator in a deal worth £4.3 billion ($5.8 billion), as Chief Executive Officer Margherita Della Valle accelerates a plan to consolidate in the company’s biggest markets.

title: US-Iran Ceasefire Holds; Apple Weighs Using Intel, Samsung for Processors | Bloomberg Brief 5/5/2026
title_cn: 美伊停火得以维持；苹果考虑使用英特尔、三星处理器彭博简报 2026 年 5 月 5 日
summary: US equity futures rebound and oil eases as the US-Iran ceasefire holds after a day of clashes involving shipping in the Strait of Hormuz and missile attacks against the United Arab Emirates. In a Bloomberg scoop, Apple has held preliminary talks about enlisting Intel and Samsung to produce the main processors for its devices in the US. Henrietta Pacquement of Allspring Global Investment sees gradual softening in the labor market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Erste Plans SRT Tied to Austrian Commercial Real Estate Loans
title_cn: Erste 计划将 SRT 与奥地利商业房地产贷款挂钩
summary: Erste Group Bank AG is working on a significant risk transfer tied to commercial real estate loans in Austria as regulators push lenders to bolster their capital buffers against potential defaults in the sector.

title: Ferrari Profit Beats Views as Higher Prices Outweigh Volume Drop
title_cn: 价格上涨超过销量下降，法拉利利润好于预期
summary: Ferrari NV reported a rise in first-quarter earnings that beat analysts’ estimates, as personal add-ons and a richer mix of supercars outweighed a wartime drop in deliveries.

title: Harbour’s Tie-Up With Waldorf Cleared in Court Defeat for HMRC
title_cn: Harbour 与 Waldorf 的合作在英国税务海关总署 (HMRC) 法庭败诉中得到澄清
summary: Harbour Energy Plc is set to acquire Waldorf Production UK after a London court dismissed an objection to plans to write off most of Waldorf’s unpaid taxes.

title: Indonesian Growth Surges to 5.6% Despite Iran Energy Crisis
title_cn: 尽管伊朗能源危机，印尼经济增速仍飙升至 5.6%
summary: Indonesia’s economic growth accelerated to a three-year high in the first quarter, as a record increase in government spending helped support consumers in the face of a global energy crisis.

title: Singapore’s Marina One Office Complex Said to Attract CapitaLand, Hongkong Land
title_cn: 新加坡滨海一号办公大楼据称将吸引凯德置地、香港置地
summary: CapitaLand Group Pte and Hongkong Land Holdings Ltd. are among possible bidders for the Marina One high-rise complex in Singapore’s central business district, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: JPMorgan’s Matejka Sees More Stock Gains After Narrow Rally
title_cn: 摩根大通的 Matejka 在窄幅反弹后看到更多股票涨幅
summary: The rebound in global stocks from their Iran war lows has been so narrow that the market is primed for broader gains triggered by even slightly positive news, according to strategists at JPMorgan Chase & Co.

title: US Companies Are Eagerly Buying Back Their Own Shares
title_cn: 美国公司急切地回购自己的股票
summary: Companies have announced $665 billion of buybacks this year.

title: Hong Kong Weathers War Shocks With Fastest Growth Since 2021
title_cn: 香港经受住战争冲击，实现2021年以来最快增长
summary: Hong Kong’s economy expanded at its fastest pace in almost five years despite a global energy crisis unleashed by the war in Iran, thanks to an insatiable global demand for artificial intelligence along with an uptick in both consumption and investment.

title: AMD Earnings Need to Justify Rally After Best Month in 25 Years
title_cn: AMD 盈利需要证明在 25 年来最好月份后的反弹是合理的
summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. is coming off its best month in the stock market since the dot-com era, and with the chipmaker’s first-quarter earnings due after the bell, investors will get a chance to see whether its shares have gotten ahead of its fundamentals.

title: France Says EU Will Retaliate If US Threatens Its Industries
title_cn: 法国表示，如果美国威胁其工业，欧盟将进行报复
summary: The European Union has tools that it can turn to if Donald Trump makes excessive threats to strategic industries such as steel, French Trade Minister Nicolas Forissier said.

title: UK to Introduce 12-Month Treasury Bills to Broaden Debt Market
title_cn: 英国将推出 12 个月期国库券以扩大债务市场
summary: The UK will begin selling 12-month Treasury bills at its weekly auctions, as part of the government’s efforts to tilt its borrowing toward shorter-maturity debt.

title: AI’s Hottest Private Firms Have Booming Crypto Shadow Market
title_cn: 人工智能最热门的私营公司拥有蓬勃发展的加密货币影子市场
summary: The race to sell retail investors a piece of the AI boom has gone mainstream — closed-end funds, interval funds, special-purpose vehicles. Now, crypto platforms are offering trades tied to the most valuable private AI companies on earth — ones ordinary investors have almost no other way to access.

title: European Corn Hits Two-Year High as Input Cost Concerns Mount
title_cn: 由于投入成本担忧加剧，欧洲玉米触及两年高点
summary: European corn hit a fresh two-year high as weather concerns and higher farm input costs due to the closure of the Strait of Hormuz threaten to limit supply outside the US.

title: Brazil Nears Its China Beef Quota in Big Shift for Trade Flows
title_cn: 巴西接近中国牛肉配额，贸易流发生重大转变
summary: The world’s top beef exporter Brazil is close to reaching its annual quota for shipments to its biggest buyer China, a situation that’s set to redraw trade flows at a time when global consumers are facing higher meat prices.

title: India’s RBI Mulls New Move Using Foreign Bonds to Prop Up Rupee
title_cn: 印度储备银行考虑采取新举措，利用外国债券支撑卢比
summary: India’s central bank, grappling to support the beleaguered rupee, is weighing a plan for state-owned lenders to sell foreign-currency bonds to draw capital inflows, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Japan Has Two More Windows for Yen Intervention by IMF Rules
title_cn: 日本还有两个根据国际货币基金组织规则干预日元的窗口
summary: Japan can conduct only two more sessions of three-day interventions by November if it wants to maintain its status of having a freely floating exchange rate, based on International Monetary Fund guidelines.

title: Copper Rises as Traders Assess Whether US-Iran Truce Can Hold
title_cn: 交易商评估美伊休战能否维持，铜价上涨
summary: Copper rose slightly along with most risk assets, as traders monitor whether a fragile ceasefire in the Middle East can hold after the US and Iran exchanged fire in the Persian Gulf on Monday.

title: Ratcliffe’s Ineos Markets New Bond After Boost From Iran War
title_cn: 拉特克利夫的英力士在伊朗战争推动下发行新债券
summary: Ineos Group, the heavily-indebted chemicals conglomerate helmed by Jim Ratcliffe, plans to raise €400 million ($468 million) from bonds to repay upcoming term loans.

title: Oil Slips After Clashes Around Hormuz Strain Fragile Truce
title_cn: 霍尔木兹紧张局势引发脆弱休战后石油价格下滑
summary: Oil dipped after Monday’s jump, as traders tracked the increasingly fragile four-week ceasefire in the Middle East following fresh clashes between the US and Iran.

title: Emerging Assets Drop as Middle East Flareup Weighs on Sentiment
title_cn: 中东局势打压市场情绪，新兴资产下跌
summary: The currency and stock benchmarks for developing economies declined as a flareup in the Middle East conflict reinforced concerns over a global inflation spike and curbed risk appetite.

title: Iran War: US Stocks Bounce as Traders Track If Truce Hold | The Opening Trade 5/5/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：交易员追踪停战协议是否有效，美国股市反弹开盘交易 5/5/2026
summary:
US stock futures rebounded and oil prices eased as traders monitor whether a fragile ceasefire in the Middle East can hold.

A flareup of violence in the Middle East has injected fresh uncertainty after a month-long rally that pushed equities to new records, fueled by strong earnings from tech megacaps and gains in chipmakers. Still, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said that talks with the Americans were “making progress.”

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Firms Agree to Give US Early Access to Evaluate Their Models
title_cn: 人工智能公司同意让美国提前评估他们的模型
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google, Microsoft Corp. and xAI have agreed to give the US government early access to their artificial intelligence models to assess the systems’ capabilities and help improve their security before the technology is released to the public.

title: Shopify Drops as Forecast Suggests Slowing Revenue Growth Pace
title_cn: Shopify 下跌，因预测显示收入增长速度放缓
summary: Shopify Inc. shares slumped as its revenue outlook suggests growth pace may be slowing down.

title: EBay Investor Skeptical That GameStop Can Make Good on Acquisition Offer
title_cn: eBay 投资者对 GameStop 能否兑现收购要约持怀疑态度
summary: Bill Smead says he’s not sure where GameStop will find the money

title: Crypto Exchange Bullish to Buy Equiniti In $4.2 Billion Deal
title_cn: 加密货币交易所看好以 42 亿美元收购 Equiniiti
summary: Bullish agreed to buy Equiniti from Siris Capital in a $4.2 billion deal, as the crypto exchange seeks to expand in blockchain-based capital markets infrastructure.

title: Meta Taps Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan for New Data Center Deal
title_cn: Meta 与摩根士丹利和摩根大通达成新数据中心交易
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is working on a financing package for a data center in El Paso, Texas, that could total roughly $13 billion, underscoring Big Tech’s growing reliance on debt to bankroll the infrastructure behind the AI boom.

title: Prysmian CEO Targets €4 Billion M&A as Hyperscaler Deals Near
title_cn: 普睿司曼首席执行官目标 40 亿欧元并购，超大规模交易临近
summary: Italian cable maker Prysmian SpA is scouting the market for a potential acquisition of about $4 billion enterprise value, Chief Executive Officer Massimo Battaini said in an interview with Bloomberg TV on Tuesday.

title: Private credit to keep growing: Pinto
title_cn: 私人信贷将保持增长：Pinto
summary: Moody’s Marc Pinto says private credit has proven resilient through a recent liquidity crunch, with software-heavy BDC portfolios holding up and troubled borrowers still low at around 0.5%. Pinto, the Global Head of Private Credit at Moody's Ratings, says the sector should continue expanding, though elevated redemptions are likely through year-end before stabilising closer to 5%. Pinto discussed the outlook on Bloomberg The Opening Trade with Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IronSource Founders’ AI Startup Zyg Raises at $500 Million Value
title_cn: IronSource 创始人的人工智能初创公司 Zyg 融资 5 亿美元
summary: Zyg, an artificial intelligence platform created by the founders of IronSource, raised funding at a $500 million valuation just two months after coming out of stealth.

title: Hong Kong Stays Hot for Medical Equipment Maker Debut: ECM Watch
title_cn: 香港医疗设备制造商首次亮相仍炙手可热：ECM Watch
summary: Shares of Star Sports Medicine Co. in their Hong Kong trading debut on Tuesday, extending a run of strong listings in the city in recent months as investors showed that appetite for Chinese stocks extends beyond companies linked to artificial intellgence.

title: Star Sports Jumps 117% as Hong Kong Debut Frenzy Extends
title_cn: 香港首秀热潮延续 Star Sports 股价跃升 117%
summary: Shares of Star Sports Medicine Co., a maker of medical devices, surged 117% in their Hong Kong trading debut on Tuesday, extending a run of hot first-day performances in the city.

title: XL Batteries' CEO Explains How the Company Went Organic
title_cn: XL Batteries 首席执行官解释公司如何走向有机化
summary:
"It was actually pure dumb luck," said Tom Sisto of the successful search for an organic compound that would eventually form the basis of his company's flow battery. Sisto is the chief executive officer and co-founder of XL Batteries, a firm with a bold goal to help "store one third of the world's electrons".

He spoke in an interview at the BloombergNEF Summit New York on April 22, 2026, touching on the duration, cost and scalability of a battery technology that doesn't rely on complex global supply chains for metals. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nscale Plans Expansion of Microsoft Data Center Site in Portugal
title_cn: Nscale 计划扩建葡萄牙的 Microsoft 数据中心站点
summary: Nscale Global Holdings has agreed to spend €695 million ($812 million) on infrastructure in Portugal in an expansion of its partnership with Microsoft Corp.

title: Apple Explores Using Intel and Samsung to Build Main Device Chips in the US
title_cn: 苹果探索使用英特尔和三星在美国制造主要设备芯片
summary: Apple Inc. has held exploratory discussions about using Intel Corp. and Samsung Electronics Co. to produce the main processors for its devices in the US, a move that would offer a secondary option beyond longtime partner Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.

title: Hon Hai Sales Grow 30% With Expansion of AI Server Business
title_cn: 鸿海AI服务器业务扩张，销售额增长30%
summary: Key Nvidia Corp. partner Hon Hai Precision Industry Co. reported a 29.7% increase in April revenue, underscoring persistently strong spending on hardware essential for AI.

title: Europe Is Debating a Digital Euro But Progress Is Slow
title_cn: 欧洲正在讨论数字欧元但进展缓慢
summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde’s push to speed up plans for a digital euro is part of a broader geopolitical effort for independence and autonomy, where the bloc is less reliant on others and can reduce exposure to major economies like the US and China. Bloomberg's Anna Irrera reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Considers Using Intel, Samsung to Build Device Processors
title_cn: 苹果考虑使用英特尔、三星来制造设备处理器
summary: Apple has held exploratory discussions about using Intel and Samsung to produce the main processors for its devices in the US. According to people familiar with the deliberations, Apple had early-stage talks with Intel about enlisting the company's chipmaking services. Apple executives also made visits to a Samsung plant under development in Texas. The move would offer a secondary option beyond longtime partner TSMC. Bloomberg's Neil Campling explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Grab to Retool in Indonesia After Abrupt Ride-Commission Cut
title_cn: 突然削减乘车佣金后 Grab 在印度尼西亚进行重组
summary: Grab Holdings Ltd. plans to adjust its Indonesian business after Jakarta’s surprise edict to lower the ride-hailing commissions it can charge, though executives expect the decree to cover just a fraction of its fleet.

title: AI Threatens Private Debt Recovery in Software: Davidson Kempner
title_cn: 人工智能威胁软件领域的私人债务追收：Davidson Kempner
summary: Disruptions caused by artificial intelligence are threatening private credit firms’ potential recovery rates in the software sector, according to Davidson Kempner Capital Management LP chief investment officer Tony Yoseloff.

title: Starwood CEO on Business Strategy, AI, Data Centers
title_cn: 喜达屋首席执行官谈商业战略、人工智能、数据中心
summary: Barry Sternlicht, Chairman and CEO at Starwood Capital Group, discusses the company's business strategy and investing in AI and data centers. He speaks with Romaine Bostick from the sidelines of the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Plans to Let Users Build Their Own Passes in iOS 27 Wallet App
title_cn: 苹果计划让用户在 iOS 27 钱包应用程序中构建自己的通证
summary: Apple Inc. is preparing a new “Create a Pass” feature for its next major iPhone software update, allowing users to build and customize their own digital tickets and gift cards within the Wallet app.

title: GameStop Makes $56 Billion Bid for eBay, Four Times Its Size
title_cn: GameStop 出价 560 亿美元收购 eBay，规模是其规模的四倍
summary: GameStop Corp. is trying to buy eBay Inc. for about $56 billion in cash and stock, a bold attempt by Ryan Cohen to take over a storied e-commerce name several times larger.

title: Alvarez & Marsal Wants to Make $3.5 Billion From AI Work by 2028
title_cn: 阿尔瓦雷斯& Marsal 希望到 2028 年从人工智能工作中赚取 35 亿美元
summary: Alvarez & Marsal wants to generate 50% of its revenue from artificial intelligence work by 2028, which would represent as much as $3.5 billion in earnings.

title: ServiceNow Sees $30 Billion Revenue by 2030 on AI Uplift
title_cn: ServiceNow 预计到 2030 年人工智能提升收入将达到 300 亿美元
summary: ServiceNow Inc. projected it would generate $30 billion of subscription revenue in 2030, attributing the strong outlook to traction from its AI products.

title: Live From the Milken Institute Global Conference | The Close 5/4/2026
title_cn: 米尔肯研究所全球会议直播|收盘价 2026 年 5 月 4 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Man Group CEO Robyn Grew, Goldman Sachs’ Marc Nachmann, Allspring Global Investments CEO Kate Burke, Senator Ted Cruz (R-TX), IBM Vice Chairman Gary Cohn, BlackRock’s Joe DeVico, eMed CEO Linda Yaccarino & Fmr. NFL Quarterback Tom Brady, Janus Henderson CEO Ali Dibadj, Pretium CEO Don Mullen, BNY CEO Robin Vince, PIMCO President Christian Stracke, Morgan Stanley’s Dan Simkowitz, Kalshi Board Member Brian Quintenz, Oak Hill Advisors CEO Glenn August, State Street CEO Ron O’Hanley, Spelman College Interim President Roz Brewer, & Guggenheim Partners’ Anne Walsh. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Citadel Chief Technology Officer Joining Motive Partners
title_cn: 前 Citadel 首席技术官加入 Motive Partners
summary: Citadel’s former Chief Technology Officer Umesh Subramanian is joining private investment firm Motive Partners, where he will lead its artificial-intelligence push.

title: Dell Grants COO Clarke Performance Options Worth $132 Million
title_cn: 戴尔授予首席运营官克拉克价值 1.32 亿美元的绩效期权
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. granted Chief Operating Officer Jeff Clarke stock options estimated to be worth $132.4 million in 2031 if the company meets annual performance goals.

title: GameStop's Cohen Sees New Target and Big Possible Payday in eBay
title_cn: GameStop 的科恩在 eBay 上看到了新的目标和可能的大收获
summary: The CEO who helped define the meme-stock era has proposed a brash, unsolicited $56 billion offer for the online commerce company.

title: Sonos Seeks $40 Million in Tariff Refunds and Revenue Jumps 8%
title_cn: Sonos 寻求 4000 万美元关税退款，收入猛增 8%
summary: Sonos Inc. shares climbed after reporting revenue that jumped 8% and said that it is filing for tariff refunds totaling $40 million that could help counterbalance rising memory costs.

title: Ukraine’s Drones Now Strike 1,000 Miles Inside Russia
title_cn: 乌克兰无人机现可攻击俄罗斯境内 1,000 英里
summary: Ukrainian drones are regularly hitting targets deep inside Russia, reaching to the Ural Mountains and communities where most people had seen the war as a distant problem.

title: Romanian Government Falls, Sowing Doubts Over Fiscal Reforms
title_cn: 罗马尼亚政府垮台，财政改革引发质疑
summary: Romania’s minority government collapsed after losing a no-confidence vote, throwing the country into renewed political turmoil and potentially stalling reforms needed to narrow the widest budget shortfall in the European Union.

title: Iran Foreign Minister Heads to China for First Time Since War
title_cn: 伊朗外长战后首次访问中国
summary: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is traveling to Beijing for talks, marking the diplomat’s first visit to China since US and Israeli strikes sparked the most severe global oil supply shock in history.

title: Trump’s Political Revenge Tour Launches in Three States
title_cn: 特朗普的政治复仇之旅在三个州展开
summary: Elections this month will test the president’s power within the GOP in his second term

title: Taiwan Defends Right to Visit Friends Despite China Pressure
title_cn: 台湾不顾中国压力捍卫探访朋友的权利
summary: President Lai Ching-te returned to Taiwan after defying China’s pressure to visit one of its last diplomatic partners, concluding a mission that showcased both Beijing’s new efforts to isolate the self-ruled democracy and his resolve to assert its global presence.

title: Warren Asks Druckenmiller to Reveal Details on Warsh Investments
title_cn: 沃伦要求德鲁肯米勒透露沃什投资的细节
summary: Elizabeth Warren pressed Stanley Druckenmiller’s investment firm to free Federal Reserve chair nominee Kevin Warsh from confidentiality agreements, seeking greater transparency into his investments before a Senate confirmation vote.

title: Starmer Warns Iran Against Encouraging Hatred Towards British Jews
title_cn: 斯塔默警告伊朗不要鼓励对英国犹太人的仇恨
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer warned Iran against encouraging antisemitism in Britain, saying UK authorities are investigating whether a foreign state was behind some of the recent attacks on the country’s Jewish community.

title: Philippines to Deepen Japan Ties While US Focuses on Iran
title_cn: 菲律宾将深化与日本的关系，而美国则关注伊朗
summary: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. told visiting Japanese Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi that their countries, both US treaty allies, will need to deepen cooperation in Asia even as Washington focuses much of its attention on the Middle East.

title: Russians Turn to Cash as Internet Blackouts Undo Digital Economy
title_cn: 由于互联网停电破坏了数字经济，俄罗斯人转向现金
summary: Cash is making a comeback in Russia as digital payments grow more unreliable with frequent mobile internet outages the Kremlin says are aimed at countering the threat of Ukrainian drone attacks.

title: Magyar Warns Orban’s Last-Minute Spree Endangers Hungary Budget
title_cn: 马扎尔警告欧尔班最后一刻的疯狂行为危及匈牙利预算
summary: Hungary’s incoming Prime Minister Peter Magyar accused his predecessor Viktor Orban of overseeing a surge in last-minute spending that risks overshooting deficit targets this year.

title: Japan’s Diplomatic Offensive Has One Major Gap
title_cn: 日本外交攻势存在重大差距
summary: Relations with China have been tense since Sanae Takaichi commented on Taiwan.

title: Indian States Face New Fiscal Threats After Election Upsets
title_cn: 选举动荡后印度各邦面临新的财政威胁
summary: Fiscal deficits are likely to widen in two Indian states where incumbents were swept out of power in elections on the back of populist spending measures, economists said.

title: Orban Ally Offers to Hand Media Empire to Hungary After Election
title_cn: 欧尔班盟友提议在选举后将媒体帝国交给匈牙利
summary: One of Hungary’s most powerful media executives offered to hand his business to the state for free, the latest sign of the shift among some of the country’s richest following Viktor Orban‘s landslide election defeat.

title: Sudan and Ethiopia Trade Barbs After Drone Attack on Khartoum
title_cn: 苏丹和埃塞俄比亚在喀土穆遭受无人机袭击后互相攻击
summary: Sudan and Ethiopia traded accusations after a drone attack on the war-torn nation’s capital, Khartoum, that’s ratcheted up tensions between the African neighbors.

title: UAE Restricts Airspace for Jets After Iran Launched Missiles
title_cn: 伊朗发射导弹后阿联酋限制喷气机领空
summary: The United Arab Emirates has partially closed its airspace for the first time in several weeks after Iran launched missiles and drones toward the UAE, in the worst flareup since the ceasefire began less than a month ago.

title: Welcome to the New Venezuela: How the US Is Reshaping Its Old Foe
title_cn: 欢迎来到新委内瑞拉：美国如何重塑其宿敌
summary: Since President Nicolás Maduro was captured by US forces and ousted from office on Jan. 3, Venezuela has entered a fast-changing and uncertain phase shaped heavily by Washington. Relations between the US and Venezuela have shifted from isolation to direct engagement: The Trump administration has restored diplomatic ties and is working with interim President Delcy Rodríguez. But that relationship is highly conditional. The US is using sanctions relief, access to global finance and control over oi

title: Romania Set to Oust Premier Without Plan for the Day After
title_cn: 罗马尼亚将在没有第二天计划的情况下罢免总理
summary: Romanian lawmakers will vote on ousting Prime Minister Ilie Bolojan in a move that could plunge the country into a renewed political crisis and imperil efforts to narrow the widest budget deficit in the European Union.

title: Tanzanian Leader Rebukes Kenya’s Ruto Over Planned Refinery
title_cn: 坦桑尼亚领导人谴责肯尼亚鲁托计划炼油厂
summary: Tanzanian President Samia Suluhu Hassan said she wasn’t consulted over a plan to establish a 650,000 barrels-a-day refinery in her nation, with the plant jointly owned by East African countries and Nigerian billionaire Aliko Dangote.

title: Thailand Eyes $12 Billion in Debt to Cushion Mideast Crisis
title_cn: 泰国拟借债120亿美元缓解中东危机
summary: Thailand’s government plans to raise 400 billion baht ($12 billion) in new debt to support farmers, low-income households, and small businesses affected by the fallout from the Middle East conflict, while accelerating the country’s shift away from fossil fuels.

title: Danish Coalition Talks Near Record as Frederiksen Seeks Deal
title_cn: 弗雷德里克森寻求达成协议，丹麦联盟谈判接近创纪录
summary: Negotiations to form Denmark’s government are set to become the longest in the Nordic country’s history as caretaker Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen continues to lead the political bargaining process six weeks after the election.

title: US-Iran Ceasefire Holds After Hormuz Clashes and UAE Strikes
title_cn: 霍尔木兹冲突和阿联酋袭击后美伊停火
summary: The fragile US-Iran ceasefire held Tuesday morning after a day of clashes involving shipping in the Strait of Hormuz and missile attacks against the United Arab Emirates.

title: Hormuz Fighting Raises Prospect of Fresh US Strikes on Iran
title_cn: 霍尔木兹战斗增加了美国对伊朗进行新一轮打击的可能性
summary: The US and Iran exchanged fire in a flareup of violence on Monday that also drew in the United Arab Emirates, prompting calls for renewed strikes on Iranian targets and casting doubt on the fate of a four-week ceasefire. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe Is Facing Stagflationary Shock, EU’s Dombrovskis Says
title_cn: 欧盟委员会主席东布罗夫斯基斯表示，欧洲正面临滞胀冲击
summary: European Union Economy Commissioner Valdis Dombrovskis warned of the stagflationary effect that the Iran war is creating for the bloc.

title: India iPhone Hub Stunned by Film Star Vijay’s Political Rise
title_cn: 印度 iPhone Hub 因电影明星 Vijay 的政治崛起而震惊
summary: In most of his films, Tamil superstar C. Joseph Vijay has saved the nation and its poor from powerful forces. He used that same script in politics this week to emerge as the unlikely winner in elections in one of India’s most economically important states.

title: Modi Opponents Allege Vote Count Violations After Key State Loss
title_cn: 莫迪的反对者声称在关键国家失败后违反计票规定
summary: India’s opposition parties allege large-scale violations in counting of votes that led to Bharatiya Janata Party’s landslide victory in West Bengal, ousting Mamata Banerjee’s Trinamool Congress.

title: Iran Fires Missiles at UAE in First Attack Since Ceasefire
title_cn: 伊朗向阿联酋发射导弹，这是停火以来的首次袭击
summary: Iran attacked the United Arab Emirates for the first time in almost a month on Monday, fracturing an uneasy calm since a ceasefire was agreed between Tehran and the US-Israel alliance.

title: Russia’s Kirishi Oil Refinery on Fire, NASA Satellites Show
title_cn: 美国宇航局卫星显示俄罗斯基里什炼油厂着火
summary: Russia’s Kirishi oil refinery near the Baltic coast is on fire after overnight drone strikes, according to NASA satellite images, as Ukraine ramps up attacks ahead of planned Victory Day ceasefires.

title: BJP’s State Poll Wins Strengthen Modi’s Grip on India
title_cn: 印度人民党在邦民意调查中获胜加强了莫迪对印度的控制
summary: India’s ruling BJP has strengthened Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s political position after decisive state election victories, reshaping the balance between government and opposition. Rahul Verma, Fellow at the Centre for Policy Research and Associate Professor at Shiv Nadar University, spoke on Insight with Haslinda Amin about the implications for governance, reforms, and India’s North-South divide. (Removed name of TV producer.)

title: Trump-Xi Meeting Approaches Even as Tensions Mount
title_cn: 尽管紧张局势加剧，特习会仍临近
summary: President Donald Trump said he's looking forward to meeting Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping, signaling that his plans for the high-stakes summit are still on despite fresh tensions between the world's two largest economies. Bloomberg's Minmin Low reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
